programme.title: Dauntless: The Battle Of Midway
programme.desc: By June 1942, the Japanese Navy has swept across the Pacific. In an effort to change the course of the war, a United States carrier group is positioned off the coast of Midway, tasked with springing a trap on the enemy. During this pivotal battle, the two-man crew of a U.S. Navy dive bomber is forced to ditch into the sea. Set adrift, the men look toward their comrades for rescue; namely the ragtag crew of an amphibious aircraft, who are sent to search for survivors. Lost in the vast openness of the Pacific, with days passing and the chance of rescue fading, the men are forced to face their own mortality.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The episode opens with contestant Geoff Rempel sharing his powerful backstory and the unique challenges of competing without a military or firearms background—proving that heart, not just experience, earns a place on this team. As the mission begins, the team links up with Pete from Red Cat Drones to run light recon and test critical communication between ground and aerial support. Red Cat brings the best of the best to the skies while the team takes to the ground on bikes, learning to operate under pressure with real-time air-to-ground coordination. But it’s not all strategy and tech—emotions run high as contestant Hayley Taylor opens up about her late father and the personal mission driving her to push harder every day. From aerial coverage to cover stories, it’s not just about who’s strongest... it’s about who’s ready when it counts.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day kicks off with a one-of-a-kind “hatting ceremony” as Don Mann is crowned—then quite literally set on fire. But there’s no time to admire the flames; Ken Shamrock is waiting with another round of punishing Lion’s Den training. With Iron Man training just one day away, the pressure is at an all-time high. Contestant Landon reflects on his past Surviving Mann experience, paying tribute to the mentors who guided him—and now stepping into that role himself. The countdown to mission time begins as gear is packed, coordinates plotted, and details roll in via Red Cat Drones. With the ISR team deployed, the first phase of the mission is underway. Every contestant must be ready to deliver their cover for status in an instant—because in this game, hesitation can be the difference between success and failure.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Only a few days in, the 32 are rapidly progressing through their training for the upcoming mission. This episode includes several challenges including live ammo run and shoot, barriers and cover and an extreme rope course. Can the leader stay on top? Or will someone else pull ahead?

programme.title: Surviving Mann

programme.title: Journey Through Corsica
programme.desc: Journey Through Corsica – Full Length Film (4K) | NatureStream.tv Embark on a breathtaking aerial and sea-level journey across the wild west coast of Corsica — where red granite cliffs plunge into turquoise coves, and the Mediterranean meets raw island wilderness. This preview trailer features spectacular drone cinematography and boat-based footage filmed around the Scandola Nature Reserve, Girolata Bay, and the rugged coastlines near Piana and Porto — some of the most dramatic seascapes in Europe. 🕊️ A NatureStream.tv Original — cinematic nature films designed for relaxation, focus, and pure visual immersion.

programme.title: Magic of Zion
programme.desc: Experience the magnificent Zion National Park in its autumn splendor! Brilliant autumn colors combine with the warm red tones of Zion's dramatic cliffs to create a visual feast like no other in" Magic of Zion". Also included is rare footage of the endangered American Condor, the largest flying land bird in North America. Watch as a wild parent Condor feeds and nurtures its fledgling on the cliffs of Zion, an awe inspiring sight since there used to be only 50 condors in existence. Runtime 82 minutes.

programme.desc:

Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Without Honors (1932) Colorized
programme.desc: “In Without Honors, cowboy star Richard Arlen rides into a frontier tangled in treachery and deceit. Framed for a crime he didn’t commit, he must fight to clear his name and expose the outlaws behind the scheme. With tense drama, blazing action, and a touch of romance, this early Western delivers a rugged tale of courage and justice won the hard way.

programme.title: Death Rides a Horse
programme.desc: A young gunfighter bent on killing the four bandits who raped and murdered his family crosses paths with a former outlaw, who hopes to extort the same men in revenge for getting him jailed.

programme.title: Abilene Town (1946) Colorized : Randolph Scott
programme.desc: Randolph Scott stars in Abilene Town, a frontier drama of change, conflict, and courage. As homesteaders and cattlemen clash over land rights, Marshal Dan Mitchell (Scott) struggles to keep the peace in a town on the brink of chaos. Torn between lawless violence, shifting loyalties, and two women pulling at his heart, the marshal must decide where he stands as Abilene’s future hangs in the balance. With vivid characters, tense standoffs, and classic Western grit, this film captures the spirit of a town caught between the old West and the new.
